endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Consumption/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available consumption REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets
endpoints.description: Lists all budgets for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the budget for a subscription by budget name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets/{name}
endpoints.description: The operation to create or update a budget. Update operation requires latest eTag to be set in the request mandatorily. You may obtain the latest eTag by performing a get operation. Create operation does not require eTag.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Consumption/budgets/{name}
endpoints.description: The operation to delete a budget.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
